name: no-answer
prompt: Wide shot from room side. Dark-haired man (Idris) standing near table LEFT of frame, brunette woman (Sera) at window RIGHT, her back still to him. Three meters between them — neither moving to close the gap. Room around them — warm amber lighting, couch center, furniture, the domestic space. He doesn't answer. The silence is the space where a conversation should be. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: another-convoy
prompt: Through window view. Running lights tracing lines across the dark outside. Another convoy passing — military vessels in formation, destination visible in their direction. World keeps moving while they're frozen. City lights below, night sky, glass surface. Brunette woman's silhouette faint at edge of frame. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: distant rumble of convoy engines fading into the night

name: anchoring-gesture
prompt: Extreme close-up. Brunette woman's pale hand pressing flat against window glass. Fingers anchoring against the cold surface. The gesture she does before difficult moments — the cost of maintaining composure. City lights visible through glass around her fingers. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
